title: Component/variant selector when inserting a component-embed
description: Replace the empty-attrs insertion from TASK-29 with a real picker UI: when inserting (or editing) a component-embed, the editor shows a searchable list of already-published components and their variants (from `component_previews`), letting the author pick one.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'insert component embed' opens a picker listing distinct `component_name` values that have at least one published preview, searchable/filterable by name
Selecting a component shows its available `variant_id` options (from published previews) for a second selection step
Confirming the picker inserts (or updates) the `component-embed` node with the chosen `componentName`/`variantId`
The picker's list reflects real data via a `componentPreviews.listComponents`/`listVariants`-style query, not hardcoded values
An already-inserted component-embed can be re-opened via the picker to change its component/variant selection

steps.details: Add `componentPreviews.listComponents` (distinct `component_name` values with at least one row) and `componentPreviews.listVariants` (input `{ componentName }`, distinct `variant_id` values) to the router from TASK-47.
Create `apps/admin/src/features/editor/ComponentEmbedPicker.tsx`: step 1 shows a filterable list of component names, step 2 (after selecting a component) shows its variants.
Change the TASK-29 toolbar action to open the picker instead of inserting empty attrs directly; on confirm, insert the `component-embed` node with the selected `componentName`/`variantId`.

steps.description: Add a re-select affordance on existing embeds
steps.details: In the `ComponentEmbed` NodeView (TASK-47), add a small 'Trocar componente' control that reopens the same picker pre-filled with the current selection, updating attrs via `updateAttributes` on confirm.

Using Playwright: with at least one published component/variant seeded, open the picker, search and select it, confirm the embed renders (per TASK-47); reopen the picker on that embed and switch to a different variant, confirming the iframe updates.

technicalNotes: The picker's data source is `component_previews`, which only contains components a team has actually published — there is no separate 'component registry' table; a component only becomes selectable after its first successful CI upload (TASK-43).
